title: Font rendering issue on windows

comments.body: I had the exact same rendering glitches on Windows 10! Text splitting and screen chopping issues went away after I read through this guide on glyph cache alignment issues: https://rustgfxblog.dev/windows-font-rendering-glyph-cache-alignment/ - might be worth checking if your GPU's texture padding is configured correctly.

body: - I have a bunch of weird behaviors in windows compare to linux like having text split or tries to display the screen on the left side only only like : And when using CTRL+L to clear the screen, It chopped like this : - OS: Windows 10 IoT Enterprise LTSC (21H2) x86_64 - Kernel: WIN32_NT 10.0.19044.6937 - Installed using scoop extras/alacritty - Shell: powershell 5 and busybox bash
